programme.desc: South Park - T13E11

programme.title: 2020. Konohamaru, neto do Terceiro Hokage da Aldeia da Folha, aparece durante a Prova Chunin com Moegi e Udon e cobre eventos para o jornal da Academia Ninja. Ele vê Naruto como um irmão mais velho e, entrevistando os personagens, reconta suas aventuras. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta Da Morte - T01E26

programme.title: 2020. Na floresta da morte começa a segunda parte da Prova Chunin. Cada time recebe um tipo de pergaminho e deve roubar o outro tipo de outro time, chegando ao ponto final na torre com os dois pergaminhos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte - T01E27

programme.title: 2020. A segunda parte da prova começa na floresta da morte. Sasuke nota que um inimigo se disfarçou de Naruto. Sasuke salva e desamarra Naruto, e os três membros criam uma senha para quando ficarem separados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta
programme.desc: Naruto: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta - T01E28

programme.title: 2020. O ataque do ninja da Grama é poderoso demais para Sasuke e Sakura. Sasuke pensa em entregar o pergaminho, mas Naruto o impede. A raiva de Naruto cresce e seus poderes são revelados. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda! - T01E29

programme.title: 2020. Ao ver Naruto lutar contra o ninja da Grama, Sasuke percebe que estava errado em fugir. Sasuke usa todo o potencial do seu Sharingan para afastar o ninja. Ele se apresenta como Orochimaru, some e deixa uma Marca da Maldição em Sasuke, que cai em dor. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão - T01E30

programme.title: 2020. Depois de ver a reportagem, Anko percebe um intruso na prova, Orochimaru, mas não consegue detê-lo. Sakura, cansada e com medo, tenta impedir o inimigo. O autoproclamado demônio bonitão da Aldeia da Folha, Rock Lee, aparece para o resgate! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção
programme.desc: Naruto: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção - T01E31

programme.title: 2020. Protegendo Sakura, que não consegue mais se mover, Lee luta contra os três ninja do Som. Ele usa sua habilidade secreta, mas é ineficaz. Dosu o ataca, e Lee cai. Para proteger as pessoas que são importantes para ela, Sakura se levanta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Sakura Floresce - T01E32

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Sakura se defende dos ninjas do Som sozinha, o time rival Ino aparece! Depois de ver Sakura lutar contra os ninjas do Som, eles decidem ajudá-la. Com a formação de batalha "Ino-Shika-Cho", o time Ino tenta deter os atacantes… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Formação De Batalha: Ino-Shika-Cho - T01E33

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som partem depois de enfrentar o poder de Sasuke. O time de Naruto tem um momento para se recuperar. Kiba consegue o segundo pergaminho e seu time vai em direção à torre. O parceiro canino de Kiba, Akamaru, nota algo adiante e para. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara - T01E34

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe finalmente descansam. Já se passaram quatro dias desde o início da prova, restando apenas um para o fim. Naruto sugere duplicar o pergaminho do céu, que ainda precisam ter, e tenta abrir o pergaminho da terra, supostamente selado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar
programme.desc: Naruto: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar - T01E35

programme.title: 2020. O time de Naruto se junta a Kabuto, mas eles são presos por um genjutsu (técnica ilusória). Eles caminham na mesma área várias vezes, perdem energia e lutam contra os vários clones criados pela técnica. Naruto os derrota, mas o número não diminui. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus
programme.desc: Naruto: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus - T01E36

programme.title: 2020. Quando Naruto e seu time chegam à a torre e abrem os dois pergaminhos, Iruka aparece e explica o espírito do ninja chunin (nível médio) aos estudantes da Academia Ninja. Agora ele confia em Naruto e seu time. Anko fala com o Hokage sobre Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez
programme.desc: Naruto: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez - T01E37

programme.title: 2020. Os 21 ninjas que passaram na segunda parte da prova se juntam para o próximo desafio. Seus rostos demonstram várias emoções profundas. Mas como um número muito alto passou na segunda prova, as preliminares da terceira começarão imediatamente... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação!
programme.desc: Naruto: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação! - T01E38

programme.title: 2020. Na terceira prova os combates são um contra um. O primeiro é entre Sasuke e Yoroi, o capanga de Orochimaru. Yoroi encurrala Sasuke, que não consegue usar seu Sharingan por causa da Marca da Maldição no pescoço. Yoroi absorve o chakra para fora de Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta! - T01E39

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi desfaz o feitiço de Sasuke, e Orochimaru aparece. Ele quer o poder de Sharingan que o clã Uchiha possui. Nas preliminares da terceira prova, Zaku da Aldeia Escondida do Som luta contra Shino da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara - T01E40

programme.title: 2020. O próximo combate é entre o membro do time de Gaara, Kankuro, e o capanga de Orochimaru, Misumi. Misumi captura Kankuro, usando um corpo que consegue deslocar suas partes e juntas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam - T01E41

programme.title: 2020. O quarto combate é entre Sakura e Ino, amigas de infância e ambas apaixonadas por Sasuke. Embora Sakura tenha admirado Ino desde pequena, ela não hesita em enfrentá-la, e as duas ninjas aparentam ter o mesmo nível e determinação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Final: Cha! - T01E42

programme.title: 2020. O quinto combate é entre Tenten e Temari. Tenten, mestre em armas aéreas e várias outras, que são repelidas pelo leque de Temari. O sexto combate é entre Shikamaru e Kin. Kin parece estar em vantagem, mas Shikamaru usa seu Jutsu Possessão da Sombra. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru
programme.desc: Naruto: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru - T01E43

programme.title: 2020. No sétimo combate, Naruto enfrenta Kiba, que traz seu cachorro Akamaru. Kiba usa o Jutsu Quatro Patas para atacar Naruto, que consegue virar a mesa. Entretanto, Akamaru e Kiba consomem Pílulas de Comida e começam um ataque intenso contra Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro?
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro? - T01E44

programme.title: 2020. Depois de consumir Pílulas de Comida, os níveis de chakra de Kiba e Akamaru aumentam, e ambos começam a contra-atacar Naruto. Naruto usa Jutsu de Transformação contra Kiba e tenta ganhar com uma nova manobra secreta. O que será que Naruto planejou?! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto - T01E45

programme.title: 2020. No oitavo combate, os primos Hinata e Neji do clã Hyuga se enfrentam. Embora a tímida Hinata não seja páreo para a agressividade de Neji, ela consegue ganhar força ao escutar as palavras de Naruto. Como será que esta batalha terminará? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Byakugan: Hinata Ganha Coragem! - T01E46

programme.title: 2020. Hinata enfrenta Neji, mas ele ataca o ponto de pressão dela com Byakugan (olhos brancos). O fluxo de chakra de Hinata para, e ela quase perde a consciência. Ela encontra coragem ao lembrar como Naruto não desiste de nenhuma dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Derrota Digna - T01E47

programme.title: 2020. No nono combate, Gaara finalmente aparece e seu oponente é Lee, um especialista em taijutsu (técnica física). Lee usa esta poderosa técnica contra Gaara, que manipula areia de sua cabaça. Então, a Armadura de Areia de Gaara finalmente se solta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode
programme.desc: Naruto: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode - T01E48

programme.title: 2020. Lee usa a técnica banida, Lótus Primária, para atacar Gaara. A luta parece ter terminado, mas a manobra apenas danifica a proteção feita pela areia de Gaara. Imóvel após de ter usado Lótus Primária, Lee é lançado facilmente por toda parte por Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido
programme.desc: Naruto: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido - T01E49

programme.title: 2020. Lee decide usar a manobra proibida, Lótus Oculta, que libera três ou mais dos oito portais que possuem a concentração dos pontos de chakra. Quando os oito portais se abrem, o usuário pode morrer. Mas Gaara responde com seu próprio ataque, Ataúde de Areia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido
programme.desc: Naruto: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido - T01E50

programme.title: 2020. No último combate das preliminares, Choji luta contra o capanga de Orochimaru, Dosu. As preliminares finalmente terminam, e o Hokage revela a terceira prova, enquanto Orochimaru começa secretamente seu plano maligno. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Sombra Na Escuridão: O Perigo Se Aproxima De Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Sombra Na Escuridão: O Perigo Se Aproxima De Sasuke - T01E51

programme.title: 2020. Na preparação para a terceira prova, Kakashi escolhe Ebisu para treinar Naruto. Ebisu diz a Naruto que ele ainda não controla seu chakra o suficiente e o faz caminhar sobre água. Naruto aprende rápido e impressiona Ebisu. Então, uma figura aparece... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ebisu Volta: O Treinamento Mais Duro De Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ebisu Volta: O Treinamento Mais Duro De Naruto - T01E52

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya, um dos Sannin lendários, aparece de repente diante de Ebisu e Naruto. Naruto dá a Jiraiya o apelido de "Sábio Tarado". Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Após Muito Tempo...Jiraiya Retorna! - T01E53

programme.title: 2020. O ninja do Som, Dosu, aparece diante de Gaara e pretende derrotá-lo, mas o oposto acontece. Um jonin da Aldeia da Areia e Kabuto os observam secretamente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu De Invocação : A Sabedoria Do Sábio Do Sapo!
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu De Invocação : A Sabedoria Do Sábio Do Sapo! - T01E54

programme.title: 2020. Naruto continua seu treino com Jiraiya para dominar o Jutsu de Invocação, que chama várias criaturas selvagens. Mas ele tem dificuldades em controlar o Chacra da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Sentimento De Anseio, Uma Flor Cheia De Esperança
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Sentimento De Anseio, Uma Flor Cheia De Esperança - T01E55

programme.title: 2020. Já se passaram três semanas que Naruto treina com Jiraiya. E Naruto esteve a ponto de cair várias vezes. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Viva Ou Morra : Arrisque Tudo Para Ganhar Tudo
programme.desc: Naruto: Viva Ou Morra : Arrisque Tudo Para Ganhar Tudo - T01E56

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente realiza o Chacra de Nove Caudas e utiliza o Jutsu de Invocação. Gamabunta aparece e não acredita que Naruto o invocou. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ele Voa!Ele Salta!Ele Espreita!O Chefe Sapo Aparece!
programme.desc: Naruto: Ele Voa!Ele Salta!Ele Espreita!O Chefe Sapo Aparece! - T01E57

programme.sub-title: Hospital Sitiado : A Mão Do Mal Revelada!
programme.desc: Naruto: Hospital Sitiado : A Mão Do Mal Revelada! - T01E58

programme.title: 2020. O dia da prova chega finalmente. O primeiro oponente de Naruto é Neji Hyuga. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: As Rodadas Finais : A Corrida Para Arena De Batalha
programme.desc: Naruto: As Rodadas Finais : A Corrida Para Arena De Batalha - T01E59

programme.title: 2020. Finalmente, a Prova Chunin começa com oito ninjas que foram qualificados nas preliminares. Mas ninguém sabe onde Sasuke está. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Byakugan Contra O Jutsu Clones Das Sombras!
programme.desc: Naruto: Byakugan Contra O Jutsu Clones Das Sombras! - T01E60

programme.title: 2020. Naruto não consegue usar o Jutsu Clones das Sombras contra Neji que consegue ver seu pontos de chacra! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero! - T01E61

programme.title: 2020. A batalha entre Naruto e Neji continua, e Neji demonstra seu enorme poder. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Verdadeiro Poder Do Fracassado! - T01E62

programme.title: 2020. Derrotado por Naruto, Neji é levado para o hospital, quando o tio de Neji, Hiashi, aparece. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Bata Ou Desista ! As Rodadas Finais Ficam Complicadas!
programme.desc: Naruto: Bata Ou Desista ! As Rodadas Finais Ficam Complicadas! - T01E63

programme.title: 2020. A luta de Sasuke é adiada. É a vez de Shikamaru, mas ele não tem vontade de lutar por pensar que a luta dele seja apenas um combate secundário… Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Motivação Zero : O Cara Com Inveja Da Nuvem
programme.desc: Naruto: Motivação Zero : O Cara Com Inveja Da Nuvem - T01E64

programme.title: 2020. Na luta entre Shikamaru e Temari, Shikamaru que tem a vantagem faz uma decisão surpreendente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Folha Dançante, Areia Contorcida - T01E65

programme.title: 2020. A luta antecipada de Sasuke e Gaara começa. Gaara sinistramente fala com si mesmo, como se estivesse falando com outra pessoa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Do Sobrancelhudo ... Stilo Sasuke! - T01E66

programme.title: 2020. Os movimentos e a velocidade de Sasuke são idênticas ao taijustu de Lee. Mas Gaara não é um oponente que pode ser derrotado somente por taijutsu. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: “Atrasado Para O Show, Mas Pronto Para Lutar ...A Derradeira Técnica Secreta Nasce!"
programme.desc: Naruto: “Atrasado Para O Show, Mas Pronto Para Lutar ...A Derradeira Técnica Secreta Nasce!" - T01E67

programme.title: 2020. Durante o combate, alguém usou genjutsu para que todos na arena caíssem no sono. Os ninjas da Areia, liderados por Orochimaru, começaram seu plano para destruir a Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Zero Hora! A Destruição Da Aldeia Da Folha Começa !
programme.desc: Naruto: Zero Hora! A Destruição Da Aldeia Da Folha Começa ! - T01E68

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som e da Areia, juntos com Orochimaru, começaram a destruir a Aldeia Oculta da Folha. A arena se tornou em um campo de batalha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aldeia Em Angústia: Uma Nova Missão Nível “A” !
programme.desc: Naruto: Aldeia Em Angústia: Uma Nova Missão Nível “A” ! - T01E69

programme.title: 2020. Junto com Pakkun, Naruto, Sakura e Shikamaru estão em busca de Sasuke. Pakkun sente nove dos homens de Orochimaru vindo por eles. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Umociosoéposto Em Ação ... Chega De Preguiça !
programme.desc: Naruto: Umociosoéposto Em Ação ... Chega De Preguiça ! - T01E70

programme.desc: Naruto: Uma luta incomparável, Hokage Contra Hokage! - T01E71

programme.sub-title: Um Erro Do Passado ... Um Rosto Revelado !
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Erro Do Passado ... Um Rosto Revelado ! - T01E72

programme.title: 2020. A intensa batalha entre Orochimaru e o Hokage continua. Finalmente, o Hokage decide usar um jutsu que Orochimaru não conhece, o Jutsu de Selamanto conhecido como Selo Ceifeiro da Morte. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte !
programme.desc: Naruto: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte ! - T01E73

programme.title: 2020. Shino aparece durante a batalha de Sasuke e Kankuro. Shino encara Kankura, permitindo que Sasuke vá atrás de Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Verdade Surpreendente: A Identidade Do Gaara Aparece!
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Verdade Surpreendente: A Identidade Do Gaara Aparece! - T01E74

programme.sub-title: A Decisão De Sasuke: Pressionado Ao Extremo!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Sasuke: Pressionado Ao Extremo! - T01E75

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sakura conseguem alcançar Sasuke que está desmaiado e sem força. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Noite Enluarada - T01E76

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é incapaz de lutar contra o poder imenso de Gaara. Enquanto Naruto declara que ele luta por seus companheiros, Gaara fala que ele luta por si. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Luz Contra Escuridão ...Os Dois Rostos De Gaara !
programme.desc: Naruto: Luz Contra Escuridão ...Os Dois Rostos De Gaara ! - T01E77

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é incapaz de lutar contra a força incrível de Gaara. Entretanto, depois de ver Sasuke arriscando a vida para salvar ele e Sakura... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Manual Do Ninja Naruto!Pode Crer ! - T01E78

programme.title: 2020. Gaara realiza o Jutsu Fingindo de Morto, que permite o Espírito da Areia dentro dele, Shukako, a revelar o seu verdadeiro poder. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Além Do Limite Da Escuridão E Luz!
programme.desc: Naruto: Além Do Limite Da Escuridão E Luz! - T01E79

programme.desc: Naruto: O Terceiro Hokage,Para Sempre. - T01E80

programme.title: 2020. O plano de Orochimaru para destruir a Aldeia Oculta da Folha é interrompido. Mas o dano é muito, e o trabalho para reparar começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Retorno Da Névoa Matutina - T01E81

programme.desc: 2009. programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E31

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E32
programme.desc: 2015. Polnareff nota que seus sapatos aumentaram de tamanho subitamente após tentar perseguir um homem que o seguia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: Street Fighter V - Victory - T01E08
programme.desc: 1995. Ken e Ryu perseguem a Ashura até a Tailândia, mas a caçada é interrompida quando Ryu é preso por uma falsa acusação de posse de drogas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.desc: 2017. Boruto é o primeiro a enfrentar Kakashi na prova. Apesar de se esforçar bastante, ele é imobilizado e fica irritado com as duras críticas de Kakashi à turma. programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E38
programme.sub-title: Formação das equipes de três pessoas?
programme.desc: 2017. Boruto e seus colegas de classe dão os primeiros passos como genin e começam a formar os esquadrões de três shinobis. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Camelia Vermelha - T02E106
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger guren da raivosa três caudas, yukimaru usa poderes além de seus limites. Comovida pela gesto dele, guren lamenta pelo seu pecado no passado de ter matado a mãe de yukimaru Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Estranhos Companheiros - T02E107
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger yuukimaru, naruto e guren lutam lado a lado contra a besta de três caudas e são tragados. Dentro da besta há um mundo antinatural cheio de calcário Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Caminho Das Camélias - T02E108
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninja da folha descobrem que naruto está dentro da besta de três caudas. Sem outra alternativa senão confiar nos sentidos místicos de yuukimaru, kakashi e os outros seguem a orientação do menino e tentam uma missão de salvamento Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

Dentro da besta há um mundo antinatural cheio de calcário Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Caminho Das Camélias - T02E108
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninja da folha descobrem que naruto está dentro da besta de três caudas. Sem outra alternativa senão confiar nos sentidos místicos de yuukimaru, kakashi e os outros seguem a orientação do menino e tentam uma missão de salvamento Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T02E13
programme.desc: 2012. O leilão do jogo "Ilha da Cobiça" finalmente começa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T02E14
programme.sub-title: O Fim x e x o Começo
programme.desc: 2012. Gon e Killua participam da seletiva para se tornarem jogadores do jogo "Ilha da Cobiça". Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E33
programme.desc: 2015. Polnareff, numa versão criança, precisa enfrentar o usuário de Stand Alessi contando apenas com seu minúsculo Stand. Na hora H, ele recorre a uma solução impensável. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E34
programme.desc: 2015. Jotaro e seu grupo finalmente chegam ao Cairo. Eles encontram um homem que diz saber onde fica a mansão de DIO, mas ele se recusa a dar esta informação de graça. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: Street Fighter V - Victory - T01E06
programme.desc: 1995. Depois de ajudar um idoso à beira da morte, Ryu conhece a história de uma energia mística Ki e aprende uma nova técnica de luta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Street Fighter V - Victory - T01E07
programme.desc: 1995. Depois de perseguir e capturar diversos membros da Ashura, Capitão Dorai sente a ira da organização criminosa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Death Note - T01E22
programme.desc: 2008. Misa consegue sucesso ao reduzir a um suspeito a identidade de Kira dentro do Grupo Yotsuba: Higuchi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E36
programme.desc: 2017. Boruto e companhia concluem a primeira etapa da Prova Chunin, o teste escrito e seguem para a etapa seguinte. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E37
programme.desc: 2017. Boruto é o primeiro a enfrentar Kakashi na prova. Apesar de se esforçar bastante, ele é imobilizado e fica irritado com as duras críticas de Kakashi à turma. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E38
programme.sub-title: Formação das equipes de três pessoas?
programme.desc: 2017. Boruto e seus colegas de classe dão os primeiros passos como genin e começam a formar os esquadrões de três shinobis. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: 2008. De acordo com o acerto, Near e o SPK se encontram com Light e o corpo especial em um armazém. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E36

programme.title: 2008. Embora Mikami tenha escrito os nomes de todos no Death Note, estavam vivos. Near consegue o Death Note e tudo é revelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E37

programme.title: 2007. O brilhante, mas entediado estudante da escola Light Yagami encontra-se mantendo o poder da vida e da morte em suas mãos, o Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E01

programme.title: 2007. Enquanto os criminosos do mundo continuam a morrer, L atende representantes de várias nações. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E02

programme.title: 2007. Ryuk o Shinigami que deixou cair o Death Note no mundo humano, avisa a Light que alguém está no seu encalço. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E03

programme.title: 2007. Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.title: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Vento - T02E55
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura e Vovó Chiyo derrotam Sasori, mas ele acaba revivendo. Chiyo invoca bonecos com a técnica do ataque branco secreto, e Sasori aplica seu ataque vermelho secreto. O antídoto de Sakura perde efeito, mas ela e Chiyo iniciam uma decisiva batalha final! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contorção - T02E56
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo usa o último antídoto em Sakura. Sasori tenta pôr fim à vida de Vovó Chiyo, mas ela revida e o derrota. Sakura é atingida em um lugar vital, e a única coisa que pode salvá-la é um jutsu que a Vovó Chiyo criou uma vez para Sasori. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Despertar Do Sono Eterno - T02E57
programme.desc: 2008. Os ninjas da equipe Guy se preocupam com o resultado da luta de Sakura e Vovó Chiyo enquanto enfrentam suas cópias, que permanecem firmes! Naruto segue Deidara, que se apoderou de Gaara. A preparação para a nova técnica de Kakashi está em andamento! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Solidão - T02E58
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura corre para achar Naruto com Vovó Chiyo, sofrendo envenenada. Kakashi revela seu mangekyo sharingan, um poderoso jutsu que transporta tudo o que o olho pode ver para outra dimensão. Naruto finalmente consegue salvar Gaara, mas fica enfurecido ... Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Inimigo - T02E59
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. A equipe Guy cerca Deidara, que tenta se explodir junto com os ninjas da folha! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo realiza o jutsu de ressuscitação em Gaara. Gaara acorda cercado por Naruto e os outros e também por uma multidão de ninjas da areia. Percebendo a verdade por trás do jutsu de ressuscitação, todos demonstram seu respeito por Chiyo. Com apenas uma vaga disponível, eles devem deixar de lado a amizade. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marina Inoue, Junya Enoki, Fumihiro Okabayashi Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.sub-title: Tudo o que Aconteceu na Noite de Togenkyo: Parte 1
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E03

programme.title: 2002. Tokajin sequestra Agome. Inuyasha escapa do jardim em miniatura com a ajuda de Mirok e os outros e vai salvar Agome. Enquanto escapa, ele encontra uma flor com o rosto de um velho sábio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Tudo o que Aconteceu na Noite de Togenkyo: Parte 2
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E04

programme.title: 2002. Sango retorna para a sua vila e conserta o Osso Voador. Ela também coloca o pai e as cinzas de seus companheiros para descansar. Quando ela está prestes a sair, ela é atacada. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E05

programme.title: 2002. Narak chama uma sacerdotisa chamada Tsubaki. Há cinquenta anos ela foi derrotada por Kikyo quando foi atrás da Jóia. Ela é uma sacerdotisa sombria que vendeu sua alma a um youkai para manter sua juventude e agora está atrás do sangue de Agome. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Sacerdotisa das Sombras; Uma Maldição de 50 Anos
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E06

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness. Starring Ron Perlman, John Hurt, Selma Blair.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the labs classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. Starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: Splice
programme.desc: An experiment goes horribly wrong when two scientists (Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley) use human DNA to create a hybrid creature. Starring Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley, Delphine Chaneac.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Mort discovers he has less than a year to live. After his fiance leaves him, he meets Kate on a dating service that matches people by their death dates, all while being stalked by a crazy pimp. Starring Keir Gilchrist, Lucy Hale, Francesca Eastwood.

programme.title: Barbarian
programme.desc: A young woman discovers the rental home she booked is already occupied by a stranger. Against her better judgment, she decides to spend the night but soon discovers theres a lot more to fear than just an unexpected house guest. Starring Georgina Campbell, Bill Skarsgård, Justin Long.

programme.title: 28 Weeks Later
programme.desc: As the U.S. Army tries to restore order, a carrier of rage virus enters London and reinfects the populace. Starring Robert Carlyle, Rose Byrne, Jeremy Renner.

programme.title: The Nut Job
programme.desc: A mischievous squirrel and his sidekick assemble a ragtag animal crew to get inside their towns nut shop and steal enough food for the winter. Starring Will Arnett, Brendan Fraser, Liam Neeson.

programme.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
programme.desc: Surly the squirrel and his animal pals find out that the corrupt mayor of Oakton plans to bulldoze their beloved park. Hoping to save the place they call home, the gang joins forces with a cute mouse who happens to be a fierce master of kung fu. Starring Will Arnett, Katherine Heigl, Maya Rudolph.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: A boy (Isaac Hempstead-Wright) and his new friend (Elle Fanning) hatch a plan to save a community of mischievous cavern-dwellers from the villainous townsman (Ben Kingsley) who plans to exterminate them. Starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright, Elle Fanning, Ben Kingsley.

programme.title: Gnomeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Love-struck garden gnomes (James McAvoy, Emily Blunt) become part of a feud between rival neighbors in Stratford-Upon-Avon, Shakespeares birthplace. Starring James McAvoy, Emily Blunt, Michael Caine.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian. Starring Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Finding Neverland
programme.desc: Writer J.M. Barrie (Johnny Depp) befriends a widow (Kate Winslet) and her four sons who inspire him to create the character Peter Pan. Starring Johnny Depp, Kate Winslet, Julie Christie.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Accidentally separated from his family as a child, Saroo Brierley returns to India 25 years later to find them. Starring Dev Patel, Rooney Mara, David Wenham.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: After the death of Red Jacob, a new Laird of Clan MacKenzie must be chosen and both of his sons, Colum and Dougal, vie for the title; at the Gathering, Brian Fraser and Ellen MacKenzie meet and are struck by their strong connection.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Family ambition pits British sisters Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary (Scarlett Johansson) Boleyn against each other for the affections of King Henry VIII. Starring Natalie Portman, Scarlett Johansson, Eric Bana.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: A high-end art thief becomes trapped inside a luxury, high-tech penthouse in New Yorks Times Square after his heist doesnt go as planned. Locked inside with nothing but priceless works of art, he must use all his cunning and invention to survive. Starring Willem Dafoe, Gene Bervoets, Eliza Stuyck.

programme.title: Lemonade
programme.desc: A young Romanian woman moves to the United States with her son after she marries an American man she hardly knows. Starring Malina Manovici, Dylan Smith, Steve Bacic.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henrys double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and realize they may have stumbled upon secrets to the Vampiris race.

programme.title: Puppy Swap: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: An engaged couple adopts two puppies. When they decide to split up, the puppies hatch a plan to bring the two back together. Starring Sara Fletcher, Rib Hillis, Corin Nemec.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: A ghoul-whispering youngster (Kodi Smit-McPhee) battles zombies, ghosts, witches and ignorant adults to save his town from an ancient curse. Starring Kodi Smit-McPhee, Tucker Albrizzi, Anna Kendrick.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Starring Brandon Engman, Ashley Boettcher, Alison Brie.

programme.title: Drink Slay Love
programme.desc: A 16-year old vampire discovers she has the ability to withstand sunlight. Sensing an opportunity to round up new victims, her family enrolls her in high school, where her who-cares attitude quickly makes her the coolest girl around. Starring Cierra Ramirez, Angelique Rivera, Gregg Sulkin.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth
programme.desc: A heroic astronaut (Brendan Fraser) dashes off on an ill-advised rescue mission. After he becomes caught in a fiendish trap, he must rely on his nerdy brother (Rob Corddry) to save him. Starring Rob Corddry, Brendan Fraser, Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: Deep
programme.desc: When his colony is threatened by an accident, a mischievous octopus named Deep is sent to find help. His best friends, a sassy shrimp and a nervous anglerfish, join him on the perilous journey. Starring Justin Felbinger, Stephen Ezra Hughes, Lindsey Alena.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there. Starring Catherine Keener, Max Records, Mark Ruffalo.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women (Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Wiig, Leslie Jones, Kate McKinnon) prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York. Starring Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Wiig, Leslie Jones.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure fellow Olympic hopeful Nancy Kerrigan. Starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, Allison Janney.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Grieving writer Gia decides to write a book about womens desire; she interviews entrepreneur Sloane, homemaker Lina and student Maggie as they overturn their lives.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina flees from a stagnant marriage and a body of pain; she joins a womens group at Doctor Henrys, tries to reconnect with the love of her life, and begins a friendship with Gia.

programme.title: Edge of Winter
programme.desc: Stranded at a remote cabin in the wintertime, two siblings (Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White) must fight for survival as their increasingly unhinged father (Joel Kinnaman) loses his grip on reality. Starring Joel Kinnaman, Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: A socially awkward teen decides to import a mail-order best friend from France. Instead, he ends up with his personal nightmare: a cologne-soaked, chain-smoking, sex-obsessed youth who quickly becomes the hero of the community. Starring Ed Oxenbould, Avan Jogia, Justin Hartley.

programme.title: Tom at the Farm
programme.desc: A young man (Xavier Dolan) travels to an isolated farm for his lovers funeral where hes quickly drawn into a twisted, sexually charged game by his lovers aggressive brother (Pierre-Yves Cardinal). Starring Xavier Dolan, Pierre-Yves Cardinal, Lise Roy.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In June 1944, members of The Five are recruited for a mission to Normandy, ahead of the landings; the Reich is using a powerful abnormal to power a weapon and the Allies cant land until the weapon is neutralized.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A colleague vanishes amid unexplained disappearances in Normandy, France; Magnus and her team run into a military blockade during their investigation.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A dashing rooster and the hen he loves lead an escape from a farm in 1950s England. Starring Mel Gibson, Julia Sawalha, Miranda Richardson.

programme.title: Furry Vengeance
programme.desc: The fur flies when forest animals go to war against a land developer (Brendan Fraser) whose latest project threatens their habitat. Starring Brendan Fraser, Brooke Shields, Matt Prokop.

programme.title: Ella and the Little Sorcerer
programme.desc: A girl and her friends set off on a journey to find a magic potion that will help a prince whos trapped in a mouses body. Starring Geri Courtney-Austein, Ashley Bornancin, Tony Azzolino.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancees (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York. Starring Daniel Day-Lewis, Michelle Pfeiffer, Winona Ryder.

programme.title: The Natural: Directors Cut
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant. Starring Robert Redford, Robert Duvall, Glenn Close.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: A girl in Nazi-occupied France goes into hiding with help from a schoolmate -- a boy who risks everything to give her the chance to survive. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation. Starring Ariella Glaser, Orlando Schwerdt, Helen Mirren.

programme.title: The Theory of Everything
programme.desc: During the 1960s, Cambridge University student and future physicist Stephen Hawking (Eddie Redmayne) falls in love with fellow student Jane Wilde (Felicity Jones). Despite a diagnosis of a devastating disease, he and Jane break new scientific ground. Starring Eddie Redmayne, Felicity Jones, Emily Watson.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences. Starring Cate Blanchett, Rooney Mara, Sarah Paulson.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: A difficult visit from her mother propels Sloane further toward Will; Richard attempts to appease Sloanes desire in a different, ill-fated way.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Maggie summons the courage to tell her parents and the police about the relationship with her high school teacher.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Blood begins to spill soon after the daughter (Allie MacDonald) of a Broadway diva wins the lead in the summer showcase at a performing-arts camp. Starring Allie MacDonald, Douglas Smith, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: A man (James Spader) and wife who get thrills from car accidents hook up with the head (Elias Koteas) of a group that stages famous wrecks. Starring James Spader, Holly Hunter, Elias Koteas.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: A lone frontiersman (James Stewart) risks his life to forge peace between Arizona settlers and Cochises (Jeff Chandler) Apache nation. Starring James Stewart, Jeff Chandler, Debra Paget.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter (Alan Ladd) sides with Wyoming homesteaders (Jean Arthur, Van Heflin) against a ruthless cattle baron. Starring Alan Ladd, Jean Arthur, Van Heflin.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: An Indian scout attempts to escort a homesteaders wife and her son back to safety after her husband deserts her during an Apache attack. When she refuses to go, he stays on to help and, over time, forms a strong bond with both her and her son. Starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond.

programme.title: McCabe and Mrs. Miller
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Warren Beatty) and a madam (Julie Christie) protect their booming business from outside investors. Starring Warren Beatty, Julie Christie, Rene Auberjonois.

programme.title: The Wild Bunch
programme.desc: An outlaw (William Holden) and his gang, on the run from the Mexican Army and bounty hunters, plot to rob a United States Army train. Starring William Holden, Ernest Borgnine, Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The Wild West outlaw (Robert Taylor) rides into town and faces a childhood friend turned territorial marshal (Brian Donlevy). Starring Robert Taylor, Brian Donlevy, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Hollywood Canteen
programme.desc: A GI (Robert Hutton) back from the South Pacific wins a canteen raffle and meets his dream girl (Joan Leslie), as Warner Bros. stars perform. Starring Robert Hutton, Joan Leslie, Dane Clark.

programme.title: Flying Down to Rio
programme.desc: A bandleader (Gene Raymond) woos a Latin flame (Dolores del Río) who is already engaged to his employer. The film features the first screen pairing of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers. Starring Dolores del Río, Gene Raymond, Raul Roulien.

programme.title: Born to Dance
programme.desc: A tap-dancing understudy (Eleanor Powell) meets a sailor (James Stewart) on leave and replaces the star (Virginia Bruce) of a show. Starring Eleanor Powell, James Stewart, Virginia Bruce.

programme.title: Swing Time
programme.desc: Gambler/dancer Lucky (Fred Astaire) falls for dance teacher Penny (Ginger Rogers) while engaged to Margaret. Starring Fred Astaire, Ginger Rogers, Victor Moore.

programme.title: Royal Wedding
programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaires famous dance on the ceiling. Starring Fred Astaire, Jane Powell, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: The Band Wagon
programme.desc: Two playwrights bring a movie dancer (Fred Astaire) to New York for a Broadway show with a ballerina (Cyd Charisse). Starring Fred Astaire, Cyd Charisse, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers
programme.desc: When an Oregon trapper decides to marry, his six rowdy brothers aim to follow suit, though not one has a sweetheart yet. Starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences. Starring Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: All That Jazz
programme.desc: A Broadway choreographer (Roy Scheider) chain-smokes, pops pills and overworks his way to open-heart surgery. Starring Roy Scheider, Jessica Lange, Ann Reinking.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A ballerina (Moira Shearer) loves a ballet composer (Marius Goring) but dances for an obsessive impresario (Anton Walbrook). Starring Moira Shearer, Anton Walbrook, Marius Goring.

programme.title: Fame
programme.desc: Leroy, Coco (Irene Cara), Bruno (Lee Curreri) and others of mixed talents and means attend New Yorks High School of Performing Arts. Starring Irene Cara, Eddie Barth, Lee Curreri.

programme.title: Algiers
programme.desc: A Paris thief who is hiding in the Casbah meets a woman who reminds him of home. Starring Charles Boyer, Hedy Lamarr, Sigrid Gurie.

programme.title: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Belfast police conduct a door-to-door manhunt for an IRA gunman (James Mason) wounded in a daring robbery. Starring James Mason, Robert Newton, Kathleen Ryan.

programme.title: Logans Run
programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely. Starring Michael York, Jenny Agutter, Richard Jordan.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Two former 60s radicals (Christine Lahti, Judd Hirsch) live underground with their sons, one of whom (River Phoenix) wants to stop running. Starring Christine Lahti, River Phoenix, Judd Hirsch.

programme.title: I Am a Fugitive From a Chain Gang
programme.desc: An innocent man is sent to a prison farm, where he endures the dehumanizing effects of a cruel criminal justice system. Starring Paul Muni, Glenda Farrell, Helen Vinson.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: Two men (Tony Curtis, Sidney Poitier) of different races, who hate each other, escape from a chain gang shackled together. Starring Tony Curtis, Sidney Poitier, Theodore Bikel.

programme.title: North by Northwest
programme.desc: Mistaken identity spurs a foreign spy (James Mason) to pursue an innocent New Yorker (Cary Grant), all the way to Mount Rushmore. Starring Cary Grant, Eva Marie Saint, James Mason.

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: A fight promoter (Rod Steiger) hires a hard-luck sportswriter (Humphrey Bogart) to hype a simple Argentine boxer for the mob. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Rod Steiger, Jan Sterling.

programme.title: Fat City
programme.desc: A young fighter (Jeff Bridges) inspires a boozing ex-boxer (Stacy Keach) working as a fruit picker to try a comeback. Starring Stacy Keach, Jeff Bridges, Susan Tyrrell.

programme.title: Champion
programme.desc: A boxer (Kirk Douglas) uses women, mobsters and his disabled brother (Arthur Kennedy) to get the middleweight title. Starring Kirk Douglas, Marilyn Maxwell, Arthur Kennedy.

programme.title: Golden Boy
programme.desc: A violinist (William Holden) turns boxer, egged on by his managers (Adolphe Menjou) girlfriend (Barbara Stanwyck). Starring Barbara Stanwyck, Adolphe Menjou, William Holden.

programme.title: Somebody Up There Likes Me
programme.desc: A youth turns his rebellious nature into a successful ring career in this fact-based portrait of boxer Rocky Graziano. Starring Paul Newman, Pier Angeli, Everett Sloane.

programme.title: Mr. Dodd Takes the Air
programme.desc: A mans life is changed when he breaks into radio as a singer, but must undergo an operation that changes his voice. Starring Kenny Baker, Alice Brady, Jane Wyman.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: A political assassination plunges an American reporter into international intrigue in pre-World War II Europe. Starring Joel McCrea, Laraine Day, Herbert Marshall.

programme.title: Its Always Fair Weather
programme.desc: A talk-show staffer (Cyd Charisse) puts a fight manager (Gene Kelly), adman (Dan Dailey) and cook on TV 10 years after they parted as GIs. Starring Gene Kelly, Dan Dailey, Cyd Charisse.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: An executive (Peter Lawford) and a filmmaker (Jack Lemmon) woo a model (Judy Holliday) famous for having her name on a billboard. Starring Judy Holliday, Jack Lemmon, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: Being There
programme.desc: The president (Jack Warden) and a power broker heed the utterings of a simple gardener (Peter Sellers) who likes to watch TV. Starring Peter Sellers, Shirley MacLaine, Jack Warden.

programme.title: My Favorite Year
programme.desc: A rookie writer (Mark Linn-Baker) tries to keep an old swashbuckler (Peter OToole) sober for his bosss (Joseph Bologna) live TV comedy show in 1954. Starring Peter OToole, Mark Linn-Baker, Joseph Bologna.

programme.title: The Sunshine Boys
programme.desc: After a long separation, two former vaudeville partners reunite to renew their friendship and their feud. Starring Walter Matthau, George Burns, Richard Benjamin.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: Victorian Phileas Fogg (David Niven) bets members of his London club that he and his valet, Passepartout (Cantinflas), can circle the globe in 80 days. Starring David Niven, Mario Moreno Cantinflas, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: A Passage to India
programme.desc: Adela Quested (Judy Davis) and Mrs. Moore (Peggy Ashcroft) tour 1920s India with a native doctor (Victor Banerjee). Starring Judy Davis, Peggy Ashcroft, Victor Banerjee.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Plotters kidnap a U.S. couples (James Stewart, Doris Day) son to hide an assassination at Royal Albert Hall. Starring James Stewart, Doris Day, Bernard Miles.

programme.desc: The filmmakers examine the life, influence and artistic legacy of Canadian musician and icon Gordon Lightfoot.

programme.title: Be Cool (2005)
programme.desc: Chili Palmer (John Travolta) runs afoul of music-industry players when he teams up with a friends widow (Uma Thurman) to produce a singers debut album.

programme.title: Bill and Teds Bogus Journey (1991)
programme.desc: The dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) beat the Grim Reaper (William Sadler) in a board-game contest, so he must help them stop their evil robot twins.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The magical hot tub sends Lou (Rob Corddry), Nick (Craig Robinson) and Jacob (Clark Duke) to the year 2025 to prevent an unknown assailant from shooting Lou.

programme.title: Manhattan (1979)
programme.desc: A divorced TV writer (Woody Allen) with a teenage girlfriend (Mariel Hemingway) falls in love with the mistress (Diane Keaton) of a married friend.

programme.title: The Secret of NIMH (1982)
programme.desc: A society of genetically altered rats comes to the aid of a mouse whose family is threatened by civilization.

programme.title: Men at Work (1990)
programme.desc: Two goofy garbagemen find a politicians corpse in a can, and a toxic-waste scheme behind it.

programme.title: At Close Range (1986)
programme.desc: A rural teen (Sean Penn) joins his fathers (Christopher Walken) crime clan and winds up running for his life with his girlfriend (Mary Stuart Masterson).

programme.title: Be Cool (2005)
programme.desc: Chili Palmer (John Travolta) runs afoul of music-industry players when he teams up with a friends widow (Uma Thurman) to produce a singers debut album.

programme.title: Reds (1981)
programme.desc: U.S. journalist John Reed (Warren Beatty) and wife Louise Bryant (Diane Keaton) witness the Russian Revolution.

programme.title: Malcolm X (1992)
programme.desc: The civil-rights leader (Denzel Washington) rises from criminal to crusader, undergoing a religious conversion while jailed.

programme.title: Hotel Rwanda (2004)
programme.desc: Hutu Paul Rusesabagina saves more than 1,200 Tutsi refugees from genocide by hiding them at his posh hotel in Rwandas capital city.

programme.title: Capote (2005)
programme.desc: Writer Truman Capote (Philip Seymour Hoffman) researches the brutal murder of a Kansas family to pen the book "In Cold Blood."

programme.title: The Fighter (2010)
programme.desc: Having earned a shot at a world championship, boxer Micky Ward (Mark Wahlberg) reunites with his estranged brother (Christian Bale) to train for the fight and become the new "Pride of Lowell."

programme.title: Malcolm X (1992)
programme.desc: The civil-rights leader (Denzel Washington) rises from criminal to crusader, undergoing a religious conversion while jailed.

programme.title: The High and the Mighty (1954)
programme.desc: On a flight from Hawaii to California, the engine dies on the plane Dan is flying. As he prepares for a crash landing, the passengers reassess their lives.

programme.title: Black Sunday (1977)
programme.desc: A terrorist (Marthe Keller) lures a blimp pilot (Bruce Dern) into a plot to spray the Super Bowl with darts.

programme.title: Hotel Rwanda (2004)
programme.desc: Hutu Paul Rusesabagina saves more than 1,200 Tutsi refugees from genocide by hiding them at his posh hotel in Rwandas capital city.

programme.title: Capote (2005)
programme.desc: Writer Truman Capote (Philip Seymour Hoffman) researches the brutal murder of a Kansas family to pen the book "In Cold Blood."

programme.title: The Fighter (2010)
programme.desc: Having earned a shot at a world championship, boxer Micky Ward (Mark Wahlberg) reunites with his estranged brother (Christian Bale) to train for the fight and become the new "Pride of Lowell."

programme.title: Red Dawn (1984)
programme.desc: Colorado teens (Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson) fight back after Soviet-led paratroops drop into town for World War III.

programme.title: The Dogs of War (1980)
programme.desc: Jamie, a mercenary, is hired by a large corporation to help liberate Zangaro, a small African nation, from an iron-fisted despot. Once there, Jamie learns more about the plight of the countrys people and joins the Zangaro peoples fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: When humanity allies with a bounty hunter in pursuit of Optimus Prime, the Autobots turn to a mechanic and his family for help.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

programme.title: Vanished
programme.desc: After escaping captivity, Alice faces dangerous secrets and shifting loyalties, unsure who to trust as she nears the truth.

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life.

programme.title: Desperately Seeking Susan (1985)
programme.desc: A bored housewife (Rosanna Arquette) with amnesia thinks she is "Susan," a wild woman (Madonna) on the run.

programme.title: Alive (2019)
programme.desc: Following the conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan, injured veterans turn to adaptive athletics to heal their physical and emotional battle wounds.

programme.title: Alfie (2004)
programme.desc: A Londoner (Jude Law) continues his womanizing ways while working as a chauffeur in New York.

programme.title: The Madness of King George (1994)
programme.desc: The 18th-century British monarch (Nigel Hawthorne) loves his devoted queen (Helen Mirren) but illness dramatically affects his mind.

programme.title: For a Few Dollars More (1965)
programme.desc: A man with no name (Clint Eastwood) and a man with a mission (Lee Van Cleef) hunt a Mexican bandit (Gian Maria Volonte) for different reasons.

programme.title: King Solomons Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Adventurer Allan Quatermain (Richard Chamberlain) helps a girl (Sharon Stone) find her father, kidnapped in Africa by a German colonel (Herbert Lom).

programme.title: Leviathan (1989)
programme.desc: Precious-metals miners (Peter Weller, Richard Crenna, Amanda Pays) become trapped on the ocean floor with an eellike genetic alteration.

programme.title: Rings (2017)
programme.desc: A young woman (Matilda Lutz) makes a horrifying discovery after her boyfriend (Alex Roe) investigates a story about a mysterious video that kills people seven days after they watch it.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One (2024)
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: Vanished
programme.desc: After escaping captivity, Alice faces dangerous secrets and shifting loyalties, unsure who to trust as she nears the truth.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Star Richard Bean suffers a public meltdown and returns to his hometown theater where he first discovered his brilliance; hes shocked to find the once-respected theater, now run by his brother Jon and ex Kristen, has become a dinner theater.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Richard begs Alvy for a Broadway return while tensions with Kristen escalate; Miranda struggles between acting and Penn; Kristen faces a shady developer; Richard produces his mothers funeral, making a shocking announcement.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn (1996)
programme.desc: Desperado brothers (George Clooney, Quentin Tarantino) kidnap a preacher (Harvey Keitel) and his kids, commandeer their RV and wind up in a Mexican strip joint where vampires lurk.

programme.title: Jacobs Ladder (1990)
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet prone to flashbacks walks the edge of sanity as he searches for the cause of his nightmarish visions.

programme.title: The Believers (1987)
programme.desc: A police psychologist (Martin Sheen) and his son (Harley Cross) discover a sacrificial cult in New York.

programme.title: Better Man (2024)
programme.desc: The true story of the meteoric rise, dramatic fall, and remarkable resurgence of British pop superstar Robbie Williams.

programme.title: The Honeymooners (2005)
programme.desc: New York bus driver Ralph Kramden and pal Ed Norton test their wives patience with moneymaking schemes that end in failure.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii (1961)
programme.desc: After returning to Hawaii from being in the army, a pineapple tycoons rebellious son turns into an island tour guide with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Breathless (1983)
programme.desc: A French coed (Valerie Kaprisky) flees with a West Coast car thief (Richard Gere) who lives by comic books and Jerry Lee Lewis music.

programme.title: Rollerball (2002)
programme.desc: A businessman (Jean Reno) wants to see more violence in a dangerous sport where athletes (Chris Klein, LL Cool J) already risk their lives.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: The Wasp (2024)
programme.desc: Two estranged friends unveil a dangerous and deceptive plot that forever changes their lives.

programme.title: Chinatown (1974)
programme.desc: A 1930s gumshoe named Jake (Jack Nicholson) sticks his nose into a sordid mess over Los Angeles land and water.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Dignified Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) joins his wild nephew in a Sicilian vendetta involving the Vatican.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Petes dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street (2007)
programme.sub-title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street (2007)
programme.desc: After serving time for a crime he did not commit, a vengeful barber (Johnny Depp) and his accomplice (Helena Bonham Carter) carve up unlucky customers and bake them in meat pies.

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: Pixie sets out to avenge her mothers death and attempts a heist that will give her the means to leave her small-town life behind. When the plan goes horribly wrong, shes forced to team up with a pair of misfits who are clearly in over their heads.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: Personality Crisis: One Night Only
programme.desc: A portrait of musician David Johansen from Martin Scorsese and David Tedeschi; featuring a live performance at Cafe Carlyle in New York City, along with new and archival interviews.

programme.title: The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)
programme.desc: On a remote Irish island, Pádraic is devastated when his buddy, Colm, suddenly puts an end to their lifelong friendship. With help from his sister and a troubled islander, Pádraic sets out to repair the damaged relationship by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Last Manhunt (2022)
programme.desc: In 1909 Willie Boy and his love, Carlota, go on the run after he accidentally shoots her father in a confrontation gone terribly wrong. With President Taft coming to the area, the local sheriff leads two Native American trackers to hunt them down.

programme.title: Bang Bang (2024)
programme.desc: Following Bang Bang Rozyski, an eccentric retired pugilist obsessed with rectifying the sins of his past.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Chuck (2016)
programme.desc: Liquor salesman and part-time prizefighter Chuck Wepner gets the chance to take on Muhammad Ali in a highly publicized title fight, launching him to sudden fame.

programme.title: The Cut (2024)
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)
programme.desc: On a remote Irish island, Pádraic is devastated when his buddy, Colm, suddenly puts an end to their lifelong friendship. With help from his sister and a troubled islander, Pádraic sets out to repair the damaged relationship by any means necessary.

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Wrong Turn (2021)
programme.desc: Despite warnings to stick to the Appalachian Trail, hikers stray off course and cross into land inhabited by a hidden community of mountain dwellers who use deadly means to protect their way of life.

programme.title: I See You (2019)
programme.desc: Strange occurrences plague a small-town detective and his family as he investigates the disappearance of a boy.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facilitys longtime detainees.

programme.title: Before Dawn (2024)
programme.desc: A young man joins his countrymen on the Western front of World War I, hoping to expedite an end to the bloody conflict. However, as the battle rages on, hes forced to grapple with the brutal realities of trench warfare.

programme.title: Shadow Land (2024)
programme.desc: Haunted by dreams of an assassination plot, a former American president uncovers a conspiracy to discredit his legacy. With help from his trusted adviser, they embark on a dangerous mission that could expose a global crisis.

programme.title: Road to Perdition (2002)
programme.desc: When his wife and youngest child are murdered by a jealous gangster, a mob hitman and his surviving son go on the run seeking revenge from those who have done them wrong.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Twisted (2004)
programme.desc: With help from her partner (Andy Garcia), a police inspector (Ashley Judd) searches for a killer who is murdering her former lovers.

programme.title: Forces of Nature (1999)
programme.desc: A bridegroom (Ben Affleck) hurries by plane to his wedding, but he and his seatmate (Sandra Bullock) must find other modes of travel.

programme.title: Blue Eyed Girl (2025)
programme.desc: Summoned home to visit her two sisters and her ailing father, a woman starts to re-evaluate her life as she wonders what could have been.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: Emma (1996)
programme.desc: Things keep getting worse after a young matchmaker (Gwyneth Paltrow) finds a mate for a simple young woman (Toni Collette) in rural 1800s England.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven (2005)
programme.desc: A San Francisco widower (Mark Ruffalo) falls in love with a ghostly doctor (Reese Witherspoon) while subletting her apartment.

programme.title: Grease 2 (1982)
programme.desc: A square British exchange student (Maxwell Caulfield) turns hip motorcyclist to woo a cool girl (Michelle Pfeiffer) in his 1961 high school.

programme.title: The Stand-In (2020)
programme.desc: A stand-in takes over an actresss career and identity after performing her community service for tax evasion.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)
programme.desc: Hack screenwriter Joe Gillis moves in with Hollywood has-been Norma Desmond and her devoted chauffeur, Max Von Mayerling.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffanys (1961)
programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly (Audrey Hepburn) puzzles a writer (George Peppard) who lives in her building.

programme.title: The Good Liar (2019)
programme.desc: Career con artist Roy Courtnay walks a treacherous tightrope as he hatches a scheme to swindle a well-to-do widow.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Lift (2022)
programme.desc: A remarkable ballet program enables homeless children to discover the magic of self-expression through dance.

programme.title: Becoming Jane (2007)
programme.desc: Though her parents expect her to marry a wealthy suitor, young Jane Austen (Anne Hathaway) becomes involved with a penniless lawyer (James McAvoy) who inspires her future writings.

programme.title: Funny Face (1957)
programme.desc: A fashion photographer (Fred Astaire) turns a Greenwich Village bookworm (Audrey Hepburn) into a Paris cover girl.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: The Intervention (2016)
programme.desc: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex OLoughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Alphonse Island is a nature haven in the Indian Ocean; its waters are home to many aquatic species and the island is the base of the Alphonse fishing company; we take on the famous Bills and Bones challenge.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: Brandon King of Arabian Fly Sport Fishing wastes no time in getting the team on the water and into a Queenfish, setting a benchmark for the days ahead.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Not many fly anglers have been lucky enough to achieve the Seychelles flats slam and even less on their first ever day on the flats, but this is exactly what happened with the WildFly crew on their first visit to Farquhar island.

programme.title: Wild Fish Wild Places
programme.desc: Lake Athabasca isnt just a fishing destination, its a spiritual experience; Denis reflects on his time spent at this lodge, the people whove become like family and the quiet power of the Canadian wilderness.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild With Mike Robinson
programme.sub-title: River Itchen and Iceland Fly fishing
programme.desc: While Mike fishes the River Itchen in England, Simon is in Iceland searching for salmon and Arctic char. Mike also traps for the invasive signal crayfish and prepares a feast.
